nasb.text: And whoever swears by the temple, swears both by the temple and by Him who dwells within it.

esv.text: And whoever swears by the temple swears by it and by him who dwells in it.

cnv.text: 指著聖所起誓的，就是指著聖所和住在那裡的　神起誓；

ccb.text: 指着圣殿发誓，就是指着圣殿和住在里面的上帝发誓。

csbs.text: 指着圣所起誓的，就是指着圣所和住在里面的那一位起誓；
